Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are given several tables and need to create an event log for process mining The case ID is the order id We need to derive activities and timestamps from the tables

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each order we start with an Order Created event from the Orders table using order date

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For each order line we have an Items Picked event However note that there might be multiple items per order each with a picking date We have two options a Create one event per item picking with the item and picker more detailed b Aggregate by order and take the maximum picking date as the time the order was fully picked less detailed but simpler

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Given that we are in a process mining context and we want to capture the individual picking activities well go with one event per item picking But note the activity name could be Item Picked and we can include the item id and picker as attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From the Delivery table we have two events Order Dispatched and Order Arrived We have delivery dispatch date and delivery arrival date Note There might be multiple deliveries per order split shipments Well create an event for each dispatch and arrival

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From the Invoice table we have Invoice Issued events for an order Note that an order might have multiple invoices

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From the Payments table we have Payment Received events for an invoice Note that an invoice might have multiple payments

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also have optional tables for products and resources We can use the resources table to get the name and role for the resource ids

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to output a table with columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor and other attributes Well create the events in the following way Activity Order Created Timestamp order date Resource sales person id Activity Item Picked one per item Timestamp item picking date Resource picker id Additional attributes item id quantity Activity Order Dispatched one per delivery Timestamp delivery dispatch date Resource carrier id Additional attributes delivery id delivery note Activity Order Arrived one per delivery Timestamp delivery arrival date Resource carrier id Additional attributes delivery id delivery note Activity Invoice Issued one per invoice Timestamp invoice issue date Resource billing person id Additional attributes invoice id invoice amount Activity Payment Received one per payment Timestamp payment date Resource payment method or leave blank Additional attributes payment id payment reference invoice id

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We are going to combine all these events and then sort by case id and timestamp However note that the same order might have multiple events of the same type for example multiple item pickings Well keep them all

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are also given a resources table to map resource ids to names and roles Well use that to provide the resource name in the event log Well assume that for the payment events we do not have a person so we can either use the payment method or leave the resource blank Well use the payment method

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets define the columns for the event log Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource ID Resource Name Resource Role Item ID Quantity Delivery ID Delivery Note Invoice ID Invoice Amount Payment ID Payment Reference Payment Method But note not every event will have all these We can leave them blank if not applicable

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the Payment Received events We get the invoice id payment date payment method payment reference payment id from the Payments table We need to get the order id from the invoice id We can get that from the Invoice table

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Well list all events Case 1001 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received Case 1002 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Invoice Issued Payment Received Payment Received Case 1003 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received Case 1004 Order Created Item Picked No delivery invoice or payment for order 1004 We do not have data for these so we stop here Case 1005 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Validation - PE
Text: No delivery invoice or payment for order 1004 We do not have data for these so we stop here
